name: Pagan-Wiiagiminan (Maple Nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place maple sugar and water in a pot.
2. Heat slowly without stirring.
3. Turn off the heat, then drop the walnuts into the hot syrup.
4. Stir to ensure all parts are equally coated.
5. Add hazelnuts and prunes alternately and stir well.
6. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fruits and nuts from the syrup and allow them to cool.
7. The leftover syrup can be eaten with bannock.
